faqs.question: What types of flies are most common in Malverne homes?
faqs.answer: Malverne properties typically deal with house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. House flies and fruit flies are most common in kitchens and dining areas, while drain flies breed in plumbing fixtures. Cluster flies often invade attics and wall voids in older Malverne homes during fall months seeking overwintering sites.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 fly control service include?

The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and whether ongoing preventative treatments are needed.
